title: Implement factory derivation and validation scripts (F2+F3)
intent: Create tools/factory/derive.ts and tools/factory/validate.ts. The derivation script computes factory state from artifacts. The validation script enforces schema, referential integrity, and factory invariants FI-1 through FI-5. Wire into CI as advisory (non-blocking).
acceptance_criteria: Completed and accepted prior to factory v0.1 migration
